title: Schedule
text:
SR = Statistical Rethinking by Richard McElreath
SR(T) = Solomon Kurz’s translation of McElreath’s book. McElreath’s R code is primarily in base R, and much of the Bayesian sampling utilizes an idiosyncratic package of his own design. Kurz’s workbook provides code for all of McElreath’s exercises while using tidyverse & brms syntax.
BR, = Bayes Rules by Johnson, Ott, and Dogucu

title: Bayesian Book Club
text:
This website is home to the Bayesian Boys Book Club. Just a few fellas looking to expand our statistical horizon.
We follow along with a few select readings and meet up once or twice a month to discuss what we’ve learned.
For the most part, we will work through Richard McElreath’s Statistical Rethinking, along with some assorted book chapters, empirical articles, and lecture recordings.
